The '''Kathol Republic''' was a pocket empire in the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]] centered around the [[Episol system]].

==History==
The Kathol Republic was established several decades prior to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] by a number of politicians who were seeking to escape the crumbling [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Leading a number of like-minded colonists, they traveled into the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]], and settled fourteen planets in ten neighboring star systems. At first, only two planets were habitable without [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]], and some required that the colonists lived in biospheres. However, the colonists did not mind this, and they were willing to work to build a better future for themselves and their descendants.

Unfortunately for the Republic, the union eventually fell into political infighting as the children and grandchildren of the original colonists began to take leadership roles. Never having experienced the chaos that their ancestors had sought to escape, they fell into the same underhanded patterns, vying for power as they struggled to become the President and make their homeworld the center of government for the Kathol Republic.

The government of the Republic was aware that the Galactic Republic that they had fled had fallen, and that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had risen from its ashes. They were also aware that the Empire was engaged in a civil war with a group calling itself the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The original settlers were ill-disposed towards [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and his Empire, but were not concerned with who was assigned to control the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. As of [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], they had not formed an opinion on the fledgling New Republic.

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Sho'ban Do]] of [[Pitann]] started to plan a coup to overthrow President [[Chandra Hobat]] by developing a droid remote control that would enable him to take control of all droids on a planet. To cover up his work, he started a [[Pitann droid gladiatorial games|series of droid gladiatorial contests]] that became a contentious issue within the [[Kathol Republic senatorial chambers|senatorial chambers]].

After an [[Battle of Episol|incident]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the Kathol Republic initially thought that the New Republic was a tyrannical regime that wanted to take control of their planets. However, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]], commander of the New Republic corvette ''[[FarStar]]'', managed to convince President Hobat of the truth, and uncovered the plot by Do to overthrow the legal government. In the aftermath, Hobat agreed to a tentative alliance with the New Republic.

==Governing body==
Regardless of its size, each member world of the Kathol Republic elected eleven senators to sit on the [[Kathol Republic Senatorial Council|Senatorial Council]]. From these eleven, one was chosen to be that planet's presidential candidate. The president was then chosen from the fourteen candidates by a majority vote of all the inhabitants of the Republic.

The official seat of government for the Kathol Republic was always the homeworld of the current president. Due to the large population on the capital, Dayark, the elected president was more often than not a native of the colony. The president acted as a moderator for the senatorial council, and served as the figurehead of the military. The President served for a period of three years, and could serve at least two consecutive terms.

==Laws==
Under the proxy law of the Kathol Republic, representatives of a foreign state could be held accountable for the actions of other members of that state. Because of this, the crew of the ''FarStar'' were put on trial for the actions of the ''[[Lialic II]]'' (posing as the ''[[Lialic II|Lance of Endor]]'') in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], since both identified themselves as representatives of the New Republic.

==Military==
The Kathol Republic operated a small [[Kathol Republic Navy|fleet]] of capital ships, many of which were considered obsolete by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. The backbone of the Kathol Republic fleet were a number of [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvettes]]. The Republic also maintained a force of [[Kathol Republic Marines|Marines]] for space-borne boarding actions.
